hooks.command: npx prettier --check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo '[Hook] Prettier formatting issue detected in '"$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"
grep -n 'console\.log' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '[Hook] WARNING: console.log found in '"$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"' — remove before committing' || true
git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null && echo '[Hook] console.log found in modified files — review before committing' || true
